title: Hong Kong British National (Overseas) Programme: Year 5 VCSE funding 2025
body: "Introduction  In March 2025, the Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government launched its fifth year of funding for the UK-wide Welcome Programme to support BN(O) status holders. This includes an extension of grant funding to continue our mental health and wellbeing project until September 2025.  Mental health and wellbeing project  Organisation: Barnardo’s  Extension funding: £240,600  Summary of project:  Barnardo’s are delighted to announce the continuation of our service supporting Hongkongers with their mental health and wellbeing. The service will build on our support offer that was available in Years 1-4 of Hong Kong British National (Overseas) Programme.  The service will continue to deliver:   helpline support offering advice and emotional support via telephone and email therapeutic support for children and adults, including couples counselling a virtual youth space for children age 10-13 and 14-17 regional peer support networks virtual family space resources - this online resource in Cantonese contains information on a range of topics which are particularly aimed at the challenges encountered by families monthly webinars with a focus on mental health and wellbeing 2 in person events across England volunteering opportunities for Hongkongers   Contact:        Telephone: 0808 169 1671  Email:  HongKong@barnardos.org.uk  Professionals can make a referral via the Barnardo’s website.  You can contact Barnardo’s Monday to Friday (10am to 8pm) and Saturday (10am to 3pm). "
